title: Mayhem
description: Mayhem adds custom vanilla like weapons to the game, each with custom abilities
body:
# **Mayhem Combat Mod** 


Mayhem adds various new weapons to the game. Each of which have custom behaviours or mechanics. These have been specifically designed to add new combat capabilites to the game, which still staying Vanilla friendly.

Every weapon inside of Mayhem has a custom feel and use case for the weapons. It allows for a variety of use cases. 

The abilties are as followed: 
- Rapier: Has a block. Take no damage if timed within half a second, if outside that range take half damage  (Hold right click)
- Angelic Rapier: Block and dash ability (Dash = Crouch + right click)
- Scythe: Pull entity back on crit, if 3 or more entities get hit by sweeping, heal.
- Quarterstaff: Deals increased knockback, upwards and away from the player
- Air Quarterstaff: Has a jump ability you can perform + extended reach
- Glaive: Has a wide area sweep attack with right click + extended reach


### All weapons featured in this descirption are craftable.
